mapper.select: SELECT #{projectId} AS project_id, n.ZPDIPRJLINENODEID AS node_id, n.ZPDITOWERNO AS tower_no, n.ZPDISTAKE AS stake, e.ZPDITOWERTYPE AS tower_type, e.ZPDITOWERBODYID AS tower_body_id, CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(TRIM(e.ZPDIPOSHEIGHTADJUST), '^-?[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$') THEN CAST(TRIM(e.ZPDIPOSHEIGHTADJUST) AS DECIMAL(18, 6)) ELSE NULL END AS pos_height_adjust, CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(TRIM(e.ZPDILON), '^-?[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$') THEN CAST(TRIM(e.ZPDILON) AS DECIMAL(18, 6)) ELSE NULL END AS lon, CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(TRIM(e.ZPDILAT), '^-?[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$') THEN CAST(TRIM(e.ZPDILAT) AS DECIMAL(18, 6)) ELSE NULL END AS lat FROM dced_prj_linenode n LEFT JOIN dced_prj_electric e ON e.ZPDIPRJLINENODEID = n.ZPDIPRJLINENODEID WHERE n.ZPDIPRJID = COALESCE(( SELECT v.ZPDIVERSIONID FROM dced_sys_version v WHERE v.ZPDIPARENTPROJECT = #{projectId} ORDER BY v.ZPDIVERLASTCHAGEDATE DESC, v.ZPDICREATETIME DESC, v.ZPDIVERSIONID DESC LIMIT 1 ), #{projectId}) ORDER BY n.ZPDIORDER

SELECT n.ZPDIPRJID AS project_id, n.ZPDIPRJLINENODEID AS node_id, n.ZPDITOWERNO AS tower_no, n.ZPDISTAKE AS stake, e.ZPDITOWERTYPE AS tower_type, e.ZPDITOWERBODYID AS tower_body_id, CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(TRIM(e.ZPDIPOSHEIGHTADJUST), '^-?[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$') THEN CAST(TRIM(e.ZPDIPOSHEIGHTADJUST) AS DECIMAL(18, 6)) ELSE NULL END AS pos_height_adjust, CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(TRIM(e.ZPDILON), '^-?[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$') THEN CAST(TRIM(e.ZPDILON) AS DECIMAL(18, 6)) ELSE NULL END AS lon, CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(TRIM(e.ZPDILAT), '^-?[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$') THEN CAST(TRIM(e.ZPDILAT) AS DECIMAL(18, 6)) ELSE NULL END AS lat FROM dced_prj_linenode n LEFT JOIN dced_prj_electric e ON e.ZPDIPRJLINENODEID = n.ZPDIPRJLINENODEID WHERE n.ZPDIPRJLINENODEID = #{nodeId} LIMIT 1

SELECT ZPDILEGLINENODEID AS node_id, ZPDILEGNAME AS leg_name, ZPDILEGREDUCE AS leg_reduce, CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(TRIM(ZPDILEGLENGTH), '^-?[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$') THEN CAST(TRIM(ZPDILEGLENGTH) AS DECIMAL(18, 6)) ELSE NULL END AS leg_length, CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(TRIM(ZPDIEXTRCATNUMBER), '^-?[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$') THEN CAST(TRIM(ZPDIEXTRCATNUMBER) AS DECIMAL(18, 6)) ELSE NULL END AS exposed_height, CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(TRIM(ZPDITOPELEVA), '^-?[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$') THEN CAST(TRIM(ZPDITOPELEVA) AS DECIMAL(18, 6)) ELSE NULL END AS top_elevation, CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(TRIM(ZPDISLOPE), '^-?[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$') THEN CAST(TRIM(ZPDISLOPE) AS DECIMAL(18, 6)) ELSE NULL END AS slope, ZPDIMARK AS mark FROM dced_prj_leginfo WHERE ZPDILEGLINENODEID = #{nodeId} ORDER BY ZPDILEGNAME
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dced_prj_electric ( ZPDIELCTRICID, ZPDIPRJLINENODEID, ZPDITOWERTYPE, ZPDIPOSHEIGHT, ZPDIANGLE, ZPDILON, ZPDILAT, ZPDIMARK, ZPDITOWERBODYID, ZPDIPOSHEIGHTADJUST ) VALUES ( #{electricId}, #{nodeId}, #{towerType}, #{posHeight}, #{angle}, #{lon}, #{lat}, #{mark}, #{towerBodyId}, #{posHeightAdjust} )

INSERT INTO dced_prj_leginfo ( ZPDILEGID, ZPDILEGNAME, ZPDILEGLINENODEID, ZPDILEGREDUCE, ZPDILEGLENGTH, ZPDIEXTRCATNUMBER, ZPDIMARK, ZPDITOPELEVA, ZPDISLOPE ) VALUES ( #{legId}, #{legName}, #{nodeId}, #{legReduce}, #{legLength}, #{exposedHeight}, #{mark}, #{topElevation}, #{slope} )
